content.cn_text: [旁白]: 测验3。这是雅思听力测验。你将听到一些不同的录音
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Test 3. This is the IELTS listening test. You will hear a number of different recordings

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你必须根据你听到的内容回答问题。你将有时间
content.en_text: [Narrator]: and you will have to answer questions on what you hear. There will be time for you to

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 阅读说明和问题，并且你将有机会检查你的答案。所有
content.en_text: [Narrator]: read the instructions and questions and you will have a chance to check your work. All

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 录音将只播放一次。测验分为四个部分。在
content.en_text: [Narrator]: the recordings will be played once only. The test is in four parts. At the end of the

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 测验结束时，你将有十分钟的时间将答案誊写到答题卡上。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to the answer sheet.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 现在翻到第一部分。第一部分。你将听到一位女士打电话询问
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Now turn to Part 1 Part 1. You will hear a woman calling about

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 维修她坏掉的洗衣机。首先，你有一些时间看问题1到4。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: repairing her broken washing machine. First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 4.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 现在请仔细听并回答问题1到4。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Now listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 4.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 早上好。这里是Kingswell洗衣机客户服务部。我是罗杰，有什么可以帮助您的吗？
content.en_text: [Roger]: Good morning. This is the customer service department of Kingswell washing machine. Roger speaking, how may I help you?

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 早上好。我打电话是关于
content.en_text: [Judie]: Good morning. I am calling about

content.cn_text: 我几个月前从商场买的洗衣机。现在出了点问题
content.en_text: the washing machine I bought from the mall several months ago. There is something wrong

content.cn_text: 。我该怎么办？
content.en_text: with it at the moment. So, what do I have to do?

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 好的。首先，我需要了解一些细节。请问您的名字？
content.en_text: [Roger]: Ok. First, I need to get a few details about this. Could you give me your name please?

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 是的。我是茱蒂·史密斯。[罗杰]: 好的。我还需要一个东西。有一个参考
content.en_text: [Judie]: Yes. It is Judie Smith. [Roger]: Ok. I need one more thing. There is a reference

content.cn_text: 号码。它应该在我们给您的保修卡的右上角。
content.en_text: number. It should be in the top right hand corner of the warranty card we gave you.

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 我看一下。哦，在这里。是CWX-576-884。
content.en_text: [Judie]: Let me have a look. Oh, here it is. It is CWX-576-884.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 谢谢。好的，我需要确认您的洗衣机是否仍在保修期内。
content.en_text: [Roger]: Thanks. Well, I need to make sure if your washing machine is still within the warranty period.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 那么您是什么时候买的？[茱蒂]: 哦，当然。我记得我是去年夏天买的。所以，大概是九个月前。
content.en_text: So when did you buy it? [Judie]: Oh, sure. I remember I bought it last summer. So, it was about nine months ago.

content.cn_text: 而且卡上写着这台洗衣机有两年保修期，
content.en_text: And the card here says this washing machine has a two-year warranty,

content.cn_text: 所以它肯定还在保修期内。[罗杰]: 当然在，女士。好的，那么我需要
content.en_text: so it is definitely within the period. [Roger]: Of course it is madam. Alright, then I need

content.cn_text: 您的地址。[茱蒂]: 我的旧地址还是现在的地址？[罗杰]: 您现在的地址，因为我们会派人去
content.en_text: your address. [Judie]: My old address or my current one? [Roger]: Your current one, as we will send in

content.cn_text: 为您修理洗衣机。[茱蒂]: 是牛津中街120号。
content.en_text: someone to fix the washing machine for you. [Judie]: It is 120 Middle Street Oxford.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 邮编呢？[茱蒂]: 是G-O-194-K-E。
content.en_text: [Roger]: And the postcode? [Judie]: It is G-O-194-K-E.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 现在，我需要知道洗衣机的确切问题
content.en_text: [Roger]: Now, I need to know the exact problem of

content.cn_text: 。您能详细描述一下吗？[茱蒂]: 实际上，洗衣机之前一直
content.en_text: the washing machine. Could you describe it in detail? [Judie]: Actually, the washing machine did

content.cn_text: 工作得很好，直到上周末。我放了一些衣服进去，它一开始运行正常
content.en_text: work very well until last weekend. I put some clothes into it, and it worked normally

content.cn_text: 。然后我就去园艺了。但大约30分钟后，当我
content.en_text: at first. Then I just got down to doing some gardening. But after about 30 minutes when

content.cn_text: 回到屋里，我发现它漏水了。水把整个地板都浸湿了。
content.en_text: I came back to the house, I found it was leaking. The water had soaked the entire floor.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 夫人，我很抱歉听到这个消息。那么您做了什么来阻止漏水吗？
content.en_text: [Roger]: I am sorry to hear that, madam. So did you do anything to make the leaking stop?

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 那时洗衣机完全失控了。而且警报也
content.en_text: [Judie]: At that moment the washing machine was totally out of control. And the alarm on it also

content.cn_text: 响了起来。我觉得按机器上的任何按钮都没什么用。
content.en_text: started to sound. I thought there was not much point in pressing any button on the machine.

content.cn_text: 所以我立刻关掉了机器。然后漏水就立刻停止了，谢天谢地。
content.en_text: So I just switched off the machine straight away. Then it stopped leaking at once, thank

content.cn_text: 。 [罗杰]: 嗯，我想那是您唯一能做的了。
content.en_text: goodness. [Roger]: Well, I think that was the only thing you could do.

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 哦，然后我发现我的地板几乎是一场灾难。因为它是由木头而不是大理石制成的，
content.en_text: [Judie]: Oh, then I found my floor was nearly a disaster. As it is made of wood rather than marble,

content.cn_text: 不能长时间浸泡在水中。所以我在接下来的两个小时里所做的是
content.en_text: it could not be soaked in water for a long time. So what I did in the next two hours was

content.cn_text: 擦干地板上的水。[罗杰]: 好的。[茱蒂]: 后来，我又试了一次洗衣机，
content.en_text: wiping up the water on the floor. [Roger]: Right. [Judie]: Later, I tried the washing machine once more,

content.cn_text: 但问题依然存在。[罗杰]: 好的，我已经记下了所有相关信息。稍后
content.en_text: but the problem still existed. [Roger]: Well, I've taken down all the related information. Later

content.cn_text: 我们会派一位客户工程师到您家修理。
content.en_text: we'll send a client engineer to your house to fix it.

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 好的。您能尽快安排维修工作吗，因为我工作太忙了
content.en_text: [Judie]: Okay. Could you arrange the repair work as soon as possible, as I'm too busy at work

content.cn_text: 没时间手洗衣服？[罗杰]: 这个星期六怎么样？
content.en_text: to do the laundry by hand? [Roger]: How about this Saturday?

content.cn_text: 我得查一下维修人员的日程。哦，抱歉，夫人。星期六已经被占用了。我们能为您安排的最早日期是下周二。您觉得可以吗？
content.en_text: I have to check the schedule of the repair man. Oh, sorry, madam. Saturday has been occupied. The earliest day we can arrange for you is next Tuesday. Is that okay with you?
The earliest day we can arrange for you is next Tuesday. Is that okay with you?

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 好的。那天我可以请假。总之，谢谢。哦，我的房子很好找。
content.en_text: [Judie]: Fine. I can take a leave from work that day. Anyway, thanks. Oh, my house is easy to find.

content.cn_text: 它在中央市场附近，就在邮局对面。
content.en_text: It's near the central market just across from the post office.

content.cn_text: [罗杰]: 好的。最后，请问您的电话号码？
content.en_text: [Roger]: All right. And the last thing, could you tell me your phone number please?

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 当然。是3864-1757。[罗杰]: 好的。我明白了。维修人员来之前会联系您。
content.en_text: [Judie]: Sure. It's 3864-1757. [Roger]: Okay. I've got it. The repairman will contact you before he comes.

content.cn_text: [茱蒂]: 好的。非常感谢。[罗杰]: 不客气。再见。[茱蒂]: 再见。
content.en_text: [Judie]: Okay. Thank you very much. [Roger]: You're welcome. Bye. [Judie]: Bye.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第一部分到此结束。你现在有一分钟时间检查你第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part one. You now have one minute to check your answers to part one.
